prestazioni: AMG M275 E60 V12 biturbo (6.0L) engine with a Weistec Engineering Stage 4+ turbo upgrade kit, featuring custom Garrett GT42R turbos (84mm compressor wheels, 68mm turbine wheels) and billet compressor housings, paired with a Weistec billet aluminum intercooler core (1200hp-capable) and upgraded fuel system with dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors, and a Motec M150 ECU for precise boost control (targeting 2.2 bar peak boost)

Weistec Engineering 7-speed AMG Speedshift MCT transmission reinforcement package, including a billet aluminum torque converter with a 3800 RPM stall speed, upgraded clutch packs with carbon fiber friction discs, and a reinforced differential with a 3.27:1 final drive ratio for optimized acceleration

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilover system with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed rebound), custom-valved for the SL65 Black Series chassis, paired with H&R Monoball front and rear subframe bushings, and a Weistec Engineering carbon fiber front strut brace for reduced chassis flex
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for the SL65 Black Series, featuring carbon fiber front fenders with integrated air vents, rear quarter panels with aggressive flares, and a custom rear diffuser with dual carbon fiber strakes, all finished in a matte Selenite Grey (DB475) wrap with gloss black accents

Vorsteiner V-FF 107 20-inch forged wheels (9.5x20 ET25 front, 12x20 ET45 rear) in a custom brushed titanium finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 R20 front, 325/25 R20 rear) for maximum track grip, paired with Brembo GT-R 6-piston front and 4-piston rear calipers with 400mm two-piece floating rotors

AMG Performance Studio carbon fiber exterior package, including a custom front splitter with integrated canards, a rear wing with adjustable Gurney flap (3D-printed from aerospace-grade carbon fiber), and a full carbon fiber engine cover with a clear-coated weave finish, complemented by a custom LED taillight tint (smoked with red accents) and a gloss black AMG badge delete
